title: Private world
description: A plugin for a private world to take a break from society and for Lololowke fans!
body:
**Are you watching Lololowka?** Then this plugin should be on your server 100%!

**Or maybe you're tired of the community and want some privacy?** You are completely alone in your world!

In order to teleport to the world for the first time you can use the command /goToDimension, subsequent times you can write **in the chat** “prunus”, and that would return “malus” or /returnToOverworld.

Initially your world will be 100x100 of sandstone. You can create there what you want because this world is completely YOUR and only yours. 

This is the first version of the plugin so there may be many bugs and errors.
